The owner is highly likely a sales broker working relationships within power grids or industrial parks. They use this shell to bid and sell transformers and inverter power supplies; upon winning a bid, they procure from real manufacturers, then temporarily hire external workers for on-site installation and maintenance, earning the price difference on equipment and engineering fees.
